image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, pressing half a photo, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S006. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Close-up on red mug on table; Mug lifts to reveal half a photo underneath; Photo shows a kitchen from ten years ago. narration intent: Narrator explains "红杯下面压着半张照片，照片里是十年前的厨房。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "这是我小时候的家？". shot positive notes: Close-up of a red ceramic mug on a wooden kitchen table, mug lifts to reveal a worn half-photo underneath, photo shows a dimly lit kitchen from ten years ago, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic, film grain.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, pressing half a photo, must remain visually consistent. shot S006. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Close-up on red mug on table; Mug lifts to reveal half a photo underneath; Photo shows a kitchen from ten years ago. narration intent: Narrator explains "红杯下面压着半张照片，照片里是十年前的厨房。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "这是我小时候的家？". shot positive notes: Close-up of a red ceramic mug on a wooden kitchen table, mug lifts to reveal a worn half-photo underneath, photo shows a dimly lit kitchen from ten years ago, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic, film grain.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, modern elements, bright colors, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 红杯下面压着半张照片，照片里是十年前的厨房。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
